title: Agency location health check
goal: Gather key operational signals for one location and summarize what needs attention.

steps.description: Verify the location and basic account details.
List users to check assignments and inactive owners.
Pull dashboard-level performance for the health check window.
Pull pipeline performance when a pipeline is configured.
Pull appointment performance and no-show/cancellation patterns.
Check whether ads reporting appears connected and usable.

confirmationPoints: Before changing users, workflows, calendars, or integrations based on the audit
output: Return a health summary with blockers, warning items, clean items, and recommended next tool calls.
